# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        text(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No build command provided"', description: 'Custom build command to run')
        text(name: 'TEST_SCRIPT', defaultValue: 'echo "No test script provided"', description: 'Custom test script to run')
        text(name: 'DEPLOY_STEP', defaultValue: 'echo "No deploy step provided"', description: 'Custom deployment step to run')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh(label: 'Run Build Command', script: params.BUILD_COMMAND)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh(label: 'Run Test Script', script: params.TEST_SCRIPT)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh(label: 'Run Deploy Step', script: params.DEPLOY_STEP)
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}
